page_metadata.biotools__summary: Sequence similarity searching against protein databases. FASTX and FASTY translate a DNA query. Optimal searches with SSEARCH (local), GGSEARCH (global) and GLSEARCH (global query, local database).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Sequence similarity searching against protein databases. FASTX and FASTY translate a DNA query. Optimal searches with SSEARCH (local), GGSEARCH (global) and GLSEARCH (global query, local database).
